results.rendered_html:
vi-√nud P. Ā. -nudati, ˚te, to drive away or asunder, scare away, dispel, remove,  RV. ;  ŚāṅkhŚr. ;
to strike (cords), play (on a musical instrument),  BhP.  (v.l. vi-tud), Caus. -nodayati, to drive asunder or away, dispel,  Śiś. ;  Gīt. ;
to spend (time),  MBh. ;
to divert, amuse, entertain,  Hariv. ;  Kāv. ;  Kathās. ;
to amuse one's self with, delight in (instr.),  Ragh. v, 67.

results.rendered_html:
vinud 6 P.
1 To strike, pierce.
2 To play on a musical instrument (vīṇāṃ, ātodyaṃ &c.).
3 To remove, drive away, dispel.
— Caus.
1 To remove, drive away, dispel, cast off; tāpaṃ vinodaya dṛṣṭibhiḥ  Gīt. 10 ;  Śi. 4. 66 ;  Ś. 3. 21 ;  Māl. 9. 41. 
2 To pass, spend (as time).
(pb)
3 To divert, amuse, entertain; kva nu khalvātmānaṃ vinodayāmi  Ś. 3 ; latāsu dṛṣṭiṃ vinodayāmi  Ś. 6 ;  R. 14. 77. 
4 To amuse oneself with; lakṣmīrvimodayāti yena digaṃtalaṃbī sopi tvadānanaruciṃ vijahāti caṃdraḥ  R. 5. 67.
